issue: Frontend task narrows to only haus.tanstack-query-router-patterns. A dashboard route in this fixture would also want react19 + tailwind, and likely should not lose vite8/typescript context.
expected: Frontend task should retain react19-patterns + tailwind-scss-patterns + typescript6-patterns alongside any specific accessory rule the task names.
rootCauseHypothesis: Same narrow-collapse pattern as nextjs-app-context-narrow-001: a single id match shrinks the payload to one rule with no base-stack retention.
resolvedByTest: tests/cross-bleed.test.js (laravel-with-react-frontend / build dashboard route rejects backend rules)
